title: B3. Ambiguity Detection (Pronoun Disambiguation)
label: mx1_transmute_03
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B3-ambiguity-detection-pronoun-disambiguation
Title: B3. Ambiguity Detection (Pronoun Disambiguation)

Problem:
"The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic."

Which option correctly explains the pronoun antecedent?

Answer choices: 5 options.

Grading target:
Exact match on the single letter.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
The task requires linguistic analysis of pronoun antecedents in a specific sentence to identify ambiguity or correct mapping.
node_root_helper_01 (transmuted_child): Analyze the provided linguistic problem to identify the correct antecedent for the pronouns in the following text: The investigator wanted to interview the witness in person but he was too late. On his way, he got stuck in traffic. Th
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: Ambiguous
JUSTIFICATION: Pronouns could refer to either the investigator or the witness.
